mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_settings (id, telegram_bot_token, telegram_chat_id, dingtalk_webhook, dingtalk_secret, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{telegramBotToken}, #{telegramChatId}, #{dingtalkWebhook}, #{dingtalkSecret}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_settings SET telegram_bot_token = #{telegramBotToken}, telegram_chat_id = #{telegramChatId}, dingtalk_webhook = #{dingtalkWebhook}, dingtalk_secret = #{dingtalkSecret}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_settings (id, telegram_bot_token, telegram_chat_id, dingtalk_webhook, dingtalk_secret, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{telegramBotToken}, #{telegramChatId}, #{dingtalkWebhook}, #{dingtalkSecret}, #{updatedAt}) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET telegram_bot_token = excluded.telegram_bot_token, telegram_chat_id = excluded.telegram_chat_id, dingtalk_webhook = excluded.dingtalk_webhook, dingtalk_secret = excluded.dingtalk_secret, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
